name: audit
description: Optional local audit trail for framework and content events.

settings.label: Retention period
settings.description: Delete audit records older than this many days.

settings.label: Recorded events
settings.description: Comma-separated framework events to record. Only events emitted by the application can be captured.

settings.label: Record event payloads
settings.description: Store event details in the audit log. Disable this when metadata should not be retained.
